description: Composition Black shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, short sleeves and full length buttoned placket Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron The classic appeal of natural fabrics combined with vintage cuts is back with a vengeance. Wear this shirt from mother earth with washed denims and chappals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 18”
